name: mol
description: Project workflow toolkit for MolCrafts repositories, organized around the planner-generator-evaluator harness pattern.

interface.longDescription: Plan, implement, review, test, document, and release MolCrafts projects with reusable harness-oriented workflows.
defaultPrompt: Review this project with the Mol workflow.
Create an implementation spec for this change.
Diagnose this failure without editing code.
